specific_mechanism: HopfEmbed-RAG: produce S³ embedding (4D unit-norm); project via Hopf map to S² for coarse retrieval; rerank top-k by full S³ phase distance.
llm_application: HopfEmbed-RAG: encoder head outputs e ∈ R⁴ with ‖e‖=1 (S³). Hopf projection h = π(e) ∈ S² ⊂ R³. Stage-1 retrieval over corpus uses cosine on h; top-100. Stage-2 reranks using d(e_q, e_d) = √(2-2 ⟨e_q, e_d⟩) (full S³ distance). Phase information preserved for fine ordering.
novelty_claim: HopfE (arXiv 2108.05774) uses inverse Hopf for knowledge-graph embedding (similar idea but inverse direction; KG not RAG). HopfEmbed-RAG specifically for retrieval/RAG with two-stage Hopf-projection coarse retrieval + S³ rerank is unmined.
motivation_justification: Hopf fibration is precise topological construction; projection map closed-form. Direct math, not metaphor.
sub_mechanisms: M_2: Hopf projection h = π(e) to S²
M_3: Two-stage retrieval coarse on h
M_4: S³ rerank top-k using e
